description: Use this API routine to retrieve the next node in the specified substation. The routine IniStaNode must be called first with the same substation number. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, node = nxtstanode(ista)

error_codes.description: No more nodes in this substation; ‘NODE’ is returned as zero.
‘IniStaNode’ was not called for this substation; ‘NODE’ unchanged.
